summary: Iteration 54: Complete testing of Hotel Inventory Calendar View feature (E-Tablo/Google Sheets integration). All backend API tests (11/11) passed. All UI tests passed. Calendar displays room availability, pricing, and allotment data correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/agency/availability/{hotel_id} returns grid data for March 2026
Backend: Grid has valid price and allotment values (numeric, in range)
Backend: Grid has stop_sale boolean flag (some entries with stop_sale=true)
Backend: Date range filtering (start_date/end_date params) works correctly
Backend: Room type filtering (?room_type=Deluxe) works correctly
Backend: Second hotel (Antalya Beach Resort) availability works
Backend: Hotels list returns linked hotels with sheet_managed_inventory flag
Backend: Hotels have sheet sync info (allocation_available, sheet_last_sync_at)
Backend: Hotels have status_label for UI badges
Backend: Availability endpoint requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Hotels list requires authentication (401 without token)
UI: Login as agency user (agent@acenta.test / agent123) - successful
UI: Hotels page shows 4 hotels with 'Detay & Takvim' buttons
UI: Hotel detail page loads for Demo Hotel 1 (b54305a3...)
UI: 'Envanter Takvimi' calendar component renders correctly
UI: Calendar title shows 'Envanter Takvimi'
UI: Month navigation shows 'Mart 2026' with prev/next arrows
UI: Room type filter dropdown shows 'Tüm Oda Tipleri' with options
UI: Stats bar shows 'Toplam kayıt: 66', room types, 'E-Tablo Bağlı' badge
UI: Calendar shows 31 day cells for March
UI: Day cells show price (TL) and room count (oda) for days with data
UI: Clicking day cell (Mar 15) opens expanded detail panel
UI: Expanded detail shows 3 room type cards (Deluxe, Standart, Suite)
UI: Each room card shows Fiyat (price) and Kontenjan (allotment)
UI: Month navigation (next/prev) works and changes month label
UI: Room type filter filters calendar data (Deluxe filter works)
UI: Today (2026-03-10) has highlight ring
critical_code_review_comments: Good: HotelInventoryCalendar.jsx has comprehensive data-testid coverage for automated testing
Good: Calendar component uses color-coding: green (available), amber (low), orange (none), red (stop-sale)
Good: API returns complete grid data with price, allotment, stop_sale per room type per date
Good: tenant_id query uses $in to support both org_id and tenant_id (fixes previous bug)
Good: Stats bar shows total records, room types, E-Tablo Bağlı badge, last sync time
Good: Expanded day detail shows room type cards with Fiyat and Kontenjan labels
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. 270 inventory snapshots already seeded for 2 hotels (Demo Hotel 1, Antalya Beach Resort) covering 45 days from today with 3 room types each.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 54 verified complete Hotel Inventory Calendar feature: (1) Backend API /api/agency/availability/{hotel_id} returns dates, room_types, grid with price/allotment/stop_sale, (2) Frontend calendar renders with color-coded days, month navigation, room type filter, expanded day detail, stats bar with E-Tablo Bağlı badge, (3) Hotels list page shows 'Detay & Takvim' button and Sheets Sync badge. All data-testid attributes in place. Test hotel: b54305a3-d21b-4758-b86b-3a176c447c63 (Demo Hotel 1).
